name: Pear, Cucumber and Walnut Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 ripe pears, variety of your choice
1/2 cup walnuts, chopped in large pieces
1 small bunch Italian flat leaf parsley
1/4 cup vinaigrette dressing, or low fat salad dressing of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove core and stem from pears and cut into bite size pieces.
2. Peel cucumbers and slice in half lengthwise. Scoop seeds out with a spoon and discard.
3. Slice cucumber into 1/4 in. (1/2 cm) slices.
4. In a bowl combine the pears, cucumbers, walnuts, leaves of Italian parsley, and the vinaigrette, gently tossing to mix ingredients.
Serves 4 to 6.
See recipe for this version of this classic vinagrete dressing.
